name: filing_number_present
expression: filing_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(filing_number)) > 0
description: UCC filings require a filing number for public-record matching.

name: filing_date_present
description: Filing date is required for perfection and lapse monitoring.

name: debtor_names_present
expression: debtor_names IS NOT NULL AND JSON_ARRAY_LENGTH(debtor_names) > 0
description: At least one debtor name is required.

name: secured_party_names_present
expression: secured_party_names IS NOT NULL AND JSON_ARRAY_LENGTH(secured_party_names) > 0
description: Secured party should be present for lien management.

name: lapse_after_filing_date
expression: lapse_date IS NULL OR filing_date IS NULL OR lapse_date > filing_date
description: Lapse date should be after filing date.
